title: Ulladha Naan Solla Lyrics Kedi Billa Killadi Ranga
stanzas: <div>Ulladha Naan Solla Lyrics Kedi Billa Killadi Ranga

ulladha naan solla poren
ketkanga annachi
jeichu ponavanga
sonnathellaam ennachu

nallatha seivomunu
reeluthaan vittanga
oola seiya mattum
kootani vachaanga

ulladha naan solla poren
ketkanga annachi
jeichu ponavanga
sonnathellaam ennachu

engaluku vaaipu thantha
nallaa vela paaponga
unga veetu pulla pola
oadi vandhu ketponga

veettuke sarakku varum
vedhanaiyum venanga
licence-ah kaatta solli
nacharikka maattonga

current bill-u ellaam
kattave venanga
cell-ukku rechargaiyum
naangale seivonga

ulladha naan solla poren
ketkanga annachi
jeichu ponavanga
sonnathellaam ennachu

diesel petrol ellam
siyila tharom-nga
pullaingala school-kuthaan
kootikittu povom-nga

engeyum poikalam
ticket-eh illainga
vaarathula anju naalu
leave-u vida solvomnga

ulladha naan solla poren
ketkanga annachi
jeichu ponavanga
sonnathellaam ennachu (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a sense of joy and celebration, reflecting the carefree spirit of the characters in the movie.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Kedi Billa Killadi Ranga, the song is played during a lively scene that showcases the characters enjoying life and having fun.

Who is the music director of this song?

The music for Ulladha Naan is composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, known for his catchy and vibrant tunes.

When was the song released?

Ulladha Naan was released on March 29, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ulladha Naan, the upbeat rhythm and lively lyrics encapsulate the carefree and joyous moments of the characters in Kedi Billa Killadi Ranga. The song serves as a celebration of life, encouraging listeners to embrace happiness and dance along. With Yuvan's catchy composition, it evokes feelings of excitement and festivity. This track is perfect for any occasion that calls for a lively atmosphere.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ulladha Naan from Kedi Billa Killadi Ranga is an electrifying track that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and joy. With Yuvan's vibrant music, this song is sure to get you on your feet and dancing. Experience the infectious energy that makes this song a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: I am going to say what is in my heart; people are listening, and those who have won are saying everything.
We will do good things, but they have left the real work behind and only gathered to talk.
They are the ones who are wrong; they have spoken sweet words and have done just that.
Everyone is a fraud; it's just our country.
I am going to say what is in my heart; people are listening, and those who have won are saying everything.
For us, good work is given; just like your children, they come running to listen.
When the goods come home, they say they need a license to show, and they won't let it go easily.
They want all the current bills paid, and we are the ones who do the recharges for the cell.
If you want something, you should give something in return.
I am going to say what is in my heart; people are listening, and those who have won are saying everything.
We will give diesel and petrol; the kids will go to school in groups.
We can go anywhere; if there are no tickets, we will say we need five days off.
We need to cook, and we will come together; everything is just for fun, so let’s enjoy.
We will arrange a budget for an airplane to go home.
I am going to say what is in my heart; people are listening, and those who have won are saying everything.
